name: Todo Bar UI
summary: Frontend progress bar and task list display for agent execution todos
goals: Display a visual task list showing completed, in-progress, and pending items
Provide progress feedback during agent execution

specDetail.description: A TodoBar component that renders the agent's todo list as a progress bar and checklist. Shows each task with its status (completed, in-progress, pending) and an overall progress percentage.

parameters.name: todos
parameters.description: Array of todo items with id, text, and status fields

parameters.name: isCollapsed
parameters.description: Whether the todo list is collapsed to just the progress bar

constraints: Must show completed tasks with green checkmark, in-progress with spinner, pending as grey
Must update progress bar in real-time as tasks complete
Must support expand/collapse to show full list or compact bar

acceptanceCriteria.given: the agent has a todo list during execution
acceptanceCriteria.then: the progress bar and task list update in real-time showing completion status

syncMeta.baseCommitMessage: docs(sync-specs): implement leaf determination redesign with frontend/backend criteria
